author: y4rr
content:
Phase 5 V5: paged embed_tokens shipped end-to-end on Llama 3 8B.

Added paged/embed.rs with PagedEmbedding (host row-blocks of [block_rows, hidden_size] bf16, VRAM hot set + LRU). gather() faults the unique blocks the input tokens land in, packs them into a contiguous tensor, and runs gpu_embedding_gather_bf16 with rebased indices.

PagedLlamaInferencer.embed_paged: Option<PagedEmbedding> field + enable_paged_embed(block_rows, vram_budget_bytes) method. The dense embed_tokens slice is replaced by a 0-element placeholder when paging is enabled — VRAM dropped by ~1 GiB on Llama 3 8B (vocab 128K * hidden 4096 * 2 = 1.0 GiB).

Forward dispatch: if embed_paged is set, gather goes through PagedEmbedding; otherwise the existing gpu_embedding_gather_bf16 path.

Llama 3 8B end-to-end (PAGED_EMBED_BLOCK_ROWS=512, PAGED_EMBED_BUDGET_MB=64):
* cos_sim = 1.000000 vs dense (paged_argmax = dense_argmax = 311)
* prefill seq=6 + decode_step × 4 still works, decode 178.45 ms/token
* Always-resident embed VRAM: 1024 MiB → ≤64 MiB (15× reduction on the embed contribution)
* No change to the rest of the paged stack (KV cache, SVD, TEAL, paged gate/up/downT, NVMe L3 all still work)

76 tests pass, no warnings. New tests: rebased_gather_matches_dense_for_subset_of_tokens, out_of_range_token_errors.

Remaining V3-extension axes for future sessions:
1. Async DMA prefetch — gated on internal tooling attention — head-level granularity, needs new attention sparsity predictor (orthogonal to MLP work)
4. Paged lm_head — needs full-vocab faulting strategy (not gather-style; either always load or chunked top-K matmul)
5. Generic store over T (Pod) — refactor TieredBlockStore<T = u16>, propagates DeviceRepr+ValidAsZeroBits bounds; foundation for INT8 user-side quant
6. KV cache paging — extend KvCache to spill to host/disk for 32K+ contexts on 70B+ models
